MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Susanna Kintz appeared by Zoom for Reise Kintz LLC and Kintz Law.
Cynthia Anderson appered by telephone in Propria Persona.
Joan Mason appeared by telephone in Propria Persona.

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to Ms. Kintz's request for extraordinary fees, whether the services performed by Ms. Kintz are extraordinary, whether or not the apportionment of the statutory fees were correctly calculated, whether or not it is appropriate for fees and costs incurred in another estate to be awarded in this estate, whether or not the services performed by Ms. Kintz in Margaret's estate were a benefit this estate, the initial fee agreement between Ms. Kintz and the Administrators, the issue of what lead to the breakdown in the Attorney Client relationship, etc. The Court raised the issue of why the Administrators can't take ownership of the annuities in equal shares rather than one person receiving monthly distributions and being ordered by the Court to share it with the other. The Court also noted that it has no authority to award fees incurred in another estate in this estate, and admonished the Administrators for taking distributions from the estate and hiring people to do work for the estate without Court approval. The Administrators stated that that they were not aware they needed Court authority to do so, that they did not ask Counsel and spoke of medical issues that needed to be addressed. The Petition for Apportionment of Statutory Attorney Fee, etc., and the Second Amended First and Final Account and Report of Administrators, etc. are under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Verlan Kwan for Cynthia Anderson and Judith Anderson-Mason.

The Court noted that the petition asks for an order that indicates that the Decedent died intestate, but there is a will lodged. Ms. Kwan stated that she can file a supplement and that the will is defective because it leaves everything to the Decedent's deceased Mother. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to March 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file an amended petition to be perfected.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
